headline: ALGT Strengthens Leisure Airline Position With Sun Country Acquisition
summary: Allegiant Travel's Sun Country deal expands its reach to nearly 175 cities while adding cargo and charter revenue streams.

headline: Delta Expands Europe Flights to Capture Event-Driven Travel Demand
summary: DAL adds special flights to Madrid and Munich, tapping football-driven travel demand with premium cabin offerings.

headline: Which S&P500 stocks are moving before the opening bell on Monday?
summary: As the US market prepares to open on Monday, let's get an early glimpse into the pre-market session and identify the S&P500 stocks leading the pack in terms of gains and losses.
